title: rubus tereticaulis subsp. serotinus
intro: Rubus tereticaulis subsp. serotinus, also known as the Western thimbleberry, is a subspecies of thimbleberry plant native to the Western United States. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Rubus tereticaulis subsp. serotinus include its potential to aid in reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to leverage its medicinal properties.
